turns.assistantContent:
---

## Audit Complete. Master Plan Ready for Authorization.

### What I Found (Waves 1 + 2)

**15 skills audited. 106 phase passes, 32 failures.**

| Severity | Count | Key Findings |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| 🔴 Critical | 1 | `use-hivemind-git-memory` routes to itself — non-functional |
| 🟠 High | 5 | Delegation bloated (476 lines, 4 duplicates); skill-authoring self-refs 5x; 3 invalid cross-refs to non-existent skills |
| 🟡 Medium | 23 | 13/15 skills missing `parent` field; 12/15 missing Bundled Resources tables; terminology mismatch (God Function vs Long Method) |
| 🟢 Low | 7 | Template format inconsistencies, minor self-duplication |

### Master Plan: 4 Batches, Sequential

| Batch | Scope | Tasks |
|-------|-------|-------|
| **1 — Critical** | 3 skills | Fix git-memory routing, delegation bloat, skill-authoring self-refs |
| **2 — Systemic** | 13 skills | Add parent fields + complete Bundled Resources tables |
| **3 — Alignment** | 7 skills | Terminology canon, fix 3 invalid refs, add Load Position |
| **4 — Finalize** | All 15 | Create hiveminder-operation-guidelines SKILL.md + verification pass |

### All Evidence on Disk

```
.hivemind/activity/codescan/
├── wave-1a/ (use-hivemind* audit — JSON + summary)
├── wave-1b/ (hivemind-* audit — JSON + summary)
├── wave-1c/ (remaining + guidelines — JSON)
└── wave-2/  (cross-skill conflicts — JSON + summary)

.hivemind/activity/plans/
└── skill-improvement-master-plan-2026-03-28.md
```

**The plan is at:** `.hivemind/activity/plans/skill-improvement-master-plan-2026-03-28.md`

---

**Awaiting your authorization to dispatch Batch 1 (critical fixes).** Each batch requires your go-ahead before agents are dispatched. I will NOT make changes without approval.
